headline: The 7 biggest storylines from Summer Game Fest 2026
summary: Summer Game Fest 2026 was a surprisingly hectic and important event. Major announcements highlighted industry strength despite challenges. Keynotes largely avoided hardware details, focusing on game reveals.

headline: Persona 6 exists, and that’s all we know
summary: Persona 6 was officially confirmed with a brief teaser at Summer Game Fest. The announcement pleased fans of Japanese RPGs awaiting its return. This follows the Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy conclusion reveal.

headline: Microsoft’s Xbox 25th anniversary console comes in translucent green
summary: Microsoft unveiled a special edition Xbox Series X for its 25th anniversary. The console and controller feature a nostalgic translucent green design. This design pays homage to the original Xbox console's look.

headline: Minecraft Dungeons 2 gets a September release date
summary: Minecraft Dungeons 2, the sequel, will be released on September 29th. Microsoft originally revealed the game in March with a fall 2026 window. Players will return to the world of Minecraft Dungeons for new adventures.

headline: 1666: Amsterdam Creator on the Game's Timelines... and Playing as a Cat! | IGN Live 2026
summary: Patrice Désilets discussed 1666: Amsterdam at IGN Live after a 30-minute demo release. The game endured over 15 years of development, with Désilets fighting to secure its rights. He revealed details about game timelines and playing as a cat.

headline: Star Wars: Zero Company Creators Talk Canon, Character Customization and More | IGN Live 2026
summary: Directors Greg Foertsch and James Brawley discussed Star Wars: Zero Company at IGN Live. The turn-based tactics game is set during the Clone Wars, exploring a 'war beneath the war'. Creators elaborated on game canon and character customization options.

headline: Warhammer 40,000 Dark Heresy Gameplay Trailer Puts You In the Shoes of a Grim Sci-Fi Detective | IGN Live
summary: A new gameplay trailer for Warhammer 40,000 Dark Heresy debuted at IGN Live. Players will immerse themselves as a grim sci-fi detective. The trailer showcased the game's atmospheric setting and investigative elements.

headline: Forget About Virtual Reality, Into the Dead: Crimson Heights is Hyper Reality | IGN Live
summary: Into the Dead: Crimson Heights was presented as a 'Hyper Reality' experience at IGN Live. The developers aim to move beyond traditional virtual reality. Details suggest an intensified, immersive gameplay experience.

headline: Lammy says he told JD Vance his Nowak comments were 'wrong'
summary: Lammy confronted JD Vance, calling his comments on Henry Nowak's death 'wrong'. Vance had attributed the death to a 'mass invasion of migrants'. Lammy firmly stated migration had 'nothing to do with' the incident.

headline: Christian Eriksen conscious after collapsing in Denmark game
summary: Christian Eriksen collapsed during Denmark's friendly match against Ukraine. The Danish Football Association confirmed Eriksen is now conscious. His condition caused immediate concern but he is stable.

headline: Zelensky in Downing Street for Ukraine war talks with European leaders
summary: President Zelensky met with European leaders at Downing Street for war talks. Discussions focused on the ongoing conflict in Ukraine. The meeting comes as US attention shifts towards war with Iran.

headline: M&S launches new traineeship for 1,000 young people
summary: M&S introduced a new traineeship program for 1,000 young individuals. The scheme aims to tackle rising youth unemployment and lack of training. It targets young people not in employment, education, or training.
